items.title: Spurs will be without Carter Bryant vs. Bucks tonight after Corliss Williamson indicated he may be done playing here in Vegas.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Spurs will be without Carter Bryant vs. Bucks tonight after Corliss Williamson indicated he may be done playing here in Vegas. 

Also, no Tarris Reed Jr., who is out for rest after notching 5 points and 9 rebounds (4 on offensive end) in the 70-49 win over New York on Saturday.

items.title: Carter Bryant  arrived at the Thomas & Mack Center on Saturday with instructions from his coaches to focus on spreading his wings offensively.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Carter Bryant  arrived at the Thomas & Mack Center on Saturday with instructions from his coaches to focus on spreading his wings offensively.

He did not disappoint.

"I think I showed flashes of what I'm capable of in the future…” the 20-year-old said.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Spurs' Carter Bryant bounces back in Vegas with strong offensive showing
media.description: The second-year forward scored a team-best 19 points on 7-of-10 shooting in a blowout win over the Knicks at the 2026 NBA Summer League.

items.title: Carter Bryant, Corliss Williamson applaud Wemby for making team-building contract decision.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Carter Bryant, Corliss Williamson applaud Wemby for making team-building contract decision.

"It just says a lot about his character…to be able to sacrifice like that and think about the bigger picture rather than thinking about himself,” Williamson said. 

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Carter Bryant praises Victor Wembanyama's contract sacrifice for Spurs
media.description: The forward joined assistant coach Corliss Willaimson in applauding the 22-year-old Frenchman for leaving money on the table to help build the roster around him.

items.title: Carter Bryant on Wemby’s team-building extension decision:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Carter Bryant on Wemby’s team-building extension decision:

“I don't think anybody was surprised on that in terms of the type of person Vic is. He's a winner. So whatever he can do to make the team better, that's what he's going to do every time.”

items.title: Carter Bryant on his 19-point, efficient shooting night:
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Carter Bryant on his 19-point, efficient shooting night:

“I think I showed flashes of what I'm capable of in the future, but just understanding there's a lot of work I have to do to get to that point if I want to be one of the best players in the world.”

items.title: Corliss Williamson indicated that this likely was Carter Bryant’s last game in Vegas: “As of now, we're talking about it. We started off saying he's going to play two games, so he's played two. Second game was a lot better and we saw what we needed to see.”
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt: Corliss Williamson indicated that this likely was Carter Bryant’s last game in Vegas: “As of now, we're talking about it. We started off saying he's going to play two games, so he's played two. Second game was a lot better and we saw what we needed to see.”

items.title: The Spurs want second-year pro Carter Bryant to grow as a leader in the offseason.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
The Spurs want second-year pro Carter Bryant to grow as a leader in the offseason.

It's clear he's taking the order seriously by the way he held himself accountable after his sub-par outing in the 2026 NBA Summer League opener.

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Spurs' Carter Bryant struggles to shake off rust in summer league debut
media.description: Playing in his first game since Game 5 of the NBA Finals, the second-year pro had a sub-par outing in the Summer Spurs' 93-66 loss to Atlanta.

items.title: Carter Bryant will play sparingly at Summer League. Jayden Quaintance won't play at all. Tarris Reed Jr. is ready to flash his blue-collar credentials in a Spurs jersey.
items.author: Jeff McDonald
items.body_excerpt:
Carter Bryant will play sparingly at Summer League. Jayden Quaintance won't play at all. Tarris Reed Jr. is ready to flash his blue-collar credentials in a Spurs jersey.

Those storylines and more to watch as the Spurs open Summer League today in San Francisco:

www.expressnews.com/sports/spurs...

media.title: Carter Bryant, Tarris Reed and what to watch for in Spurs Summer League
media.description: Here are five storylines to watch as the Spurs begin Summer League play on Friday in San Francisco for the California Classic before heading to Las Vegas.

items.title: Corliss Williamson said Carter Bryant's only playing time in Summer League will come in Vegas.
items.author: Tom Orsborn
items.body_excerpt:
Corliss Williamson said Carter Bryant's only playing time in Summer League will come in Vegas.

"It's an opportunity for him to explore his game a little bit...It will be a great opportunity for him to get out there and play."
